title: Quiz 3
description: Test your understanding of optimization algorithms including local search, hill climbing, simulated annealing, and genetic algorithms.
common_mistakes: Confusing local minima with global minima
Misunderstanding how simulated annealing escapes local maxima

title: Crossword
description: Write a program to generate a crossword puzzle solution using constraint satisfaction. Your program should enforce word constraints and ensure no two adjacent words share overlapping letters incorrectly.
common_mistakes: Failing to handle domains that become empty
Not backtracking properly when a dead end is reached
